data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The website automatically adjusts layout and content display across various devices, ensuring a seamless user experience.
data.technical_spec: Fluid grids, flexible images, and CSS media queries.

data.title: Cloud-Based Infrastructure
data.description: Uses cloud services for scalability and reliability of content delivery.
data.technical_spec: Content Delivery Network (CDN) and cloud hosting platforms.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: The backend is likely composed of loosely coupled services that handle different functionalities.

data.title: High Availability
data.description: Design ensures minimal downtime through redundancy and load balancing.

data.title: Single Page Application (SPA)
data.description: Some sections may use SPA design for smooth navigation without full-page reloads.
data.technical_spec: JavaScript frameworks like React or Angular.
